# viettelidc_ovpc_internet_gateway (Data Source)

Lookup an Internet Gateway by ID or name in a VPC. Internet Gateways are platform-managed resources that can only be listed and referenced.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Internet Gateway ID (vttInternetGatewayId). Either 'id' or 'name' must be specified.
- `name` (String) Name of the Internet Gateway to look up. Either 'id' or 'name' must be specified.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID to search within. Uses provider default if not specified.

### Read-Only

- `floating_ip` (String) The floating IP address assigned to the Internet Gateway.
- `status` (String) Current status of the Internet Gateway.
- `subnet_id` (String) ID of the subnet associated with the Internet Gateway.
